svg.aria-label: Antique chart of The Isle of Waukuwoa, an island in a tropical climate.
svg.title: The Isle of Waukuwoa
svg.desc: Antique chart of The Isle of Waukuwoa, an island in a tropical climate.
svg.metadata: Vellum chart. Recipe: seed=39695 type=island band=tropical land=0.34 grid=320x240 style=antique engine=0.1.0

g.text: Being a true & faithful chart of these waters, as surveyed
by Nau the Wayfarer in the year 823 of the Tide Age
